
---
title: "Parnell Reproductive Report"
subtitle: "Reproductive Performance Summary"
author: "<img src='images/parnell.jpeg' width='150' /> <br> Sarah Hills"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: false
    code-fold: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: false
embed-resources: true
params:
  event: 
    label: "Farm Name:"
    value: "Monte Vista"
    input: text
---
      
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  broom,
  tidyverse,
  dtplyr,
  gt,
  arrow,
  rmarkdown,
  lubridate,
  quarto, 
  survival,
  survminer,
  ggsurvfit,
  flextable,
  gtsummary,
  marginaleffects,
  scales,
  zoo,
  here
  )

events_formatted <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/events_formatted.parquet'))
animals <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animals.parquet'))
animal_lactations <- read_parquet(here::here('data/intermediate_files/animal_lactations.parquet'))

source(here::here("functions/fxn_load_os_fxns.R"))
fxn_load_os_fxns()

source('functions/fxn_denos_sarah.R')
herd_deno <- fxn_denos_sarah(
  lact_data = animal_lactations, 
  events_df = events_formatted, 
  animal_data = animals)

source('functions/fxn_denominators_monthly.R')
monthly_deno_data <- fxn_get_monthly_denominators(animal_lactations, animals)

#cr_url <- "[https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ParnellPharma/ParnellFunctionsPublic/main/parnell_calculate_CR_master.R](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ParnellPharma/ParnellFunctionsPublic/main/parnell_calculate_CR_master.R)"
#source(cr_url)

date_max_pull <- max(events_formatted$date_event, na.rm = TRUE)

farm_name <- if (!is.null(params$event) && params$event != "") {
  params$event
} else {
  unique(events_formatted$location_event)[1]
}

farm_name <- basename(farm_name)
farm_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(farm_name)
farm_name <- str_replace_all(farm_name, "[_|-]", " ") |> str_to_title()

```



```{r}
#| label: Eligibility
#| echo: false

vwp <- 50

periods_df <- tibble(
  period_id = 1:24,
  period_end = date_max_pull - (0:23 * 21),
  period_start = date_max_pull - (0:23 * 21) - 20
)

herd_intervals <- animal_lactations |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_fresh, date_archive, date_dry, lact_number) |>
  mutate(
    lact_group = case_when(
      lact_number == 1 ~ "Lact 1",
      lact_number == 2 ~ "Lact 2",
      lact_number >= 3 ~ "Lact 3+",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

cow_status <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event %in% c("BRED", "OPEN", "DNB")) |>
  group_by(id_animal_lact) |>
  summarise(
    last_preg = max(date_event[event == "BRED"], na.rm = TRUE),
    last_open = max(date_event[event == "OPEN"], na.rm = TRUE),
    last_dnb = max(date_event[event == "DNB"], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(c(last_preg, last_open, last_dnb), ~if_else(is.infinite(.x), as.Date(NA), .x)))

eligible_cows_by_period <- periods_df |>
  cross_join(herd_intervals) |>
  left_join(cow_status, by = "id_animal_lact") |>
  filter(
    lact_number > 0,
    date_fresh <= period_end,
    (is.na(date_archive) | date_archive >= period_end),
    (is.na(date_dry) | date_dry > period_end),
    as.numeric(period_start - date_fresh) > vwp,
    is.na(last_preg) | (!is.na(last_open) & last_open > last_preg) | (last_preg > period_start),
    is.na(last_dnb) | last_dnb > period_end
  ) |>
  group_by(period_id, id_animal_lact) |>
  slice_max(date_fresh, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()


```



```{r}
#| label: Insemination Rate
#| echo: false

bred_flags <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED") |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_event, R) |>
  cross_join(periods_df) |>
  filter(date_event >= period_start, date_event <= period_end) |>
  distinct(id_animal_lact, period_id) |>
  mutate(is_bred = TRUE)

bred_report <- eligible_cows_by_period |>
  left_join(bred_flags, by = c("id_animal_lact", "period_id")) |>
  mutate(is_bred = replace_na(is_bred, FALSE))

ir_summary <- bred_report |>
  group_by(period_id, period_start, period_end) |>
  summarise(
    n_eligible = n(),
    n_bred = sum(is_bred),
    insemination_rate = n_bred / n_eligible,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ir_summary |>
  arrange(desc(period_start)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Insemination Rate Report",
    subtitle = "Calculated per 21-Day Period"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    period_id = "Period",
    period_start = "Start",
    period_end = "End",
    n_eligible = "Eligible Cows",
    n_bred = "Bred Cows",
    insemination_rate = "IR %"
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = insemination_rate, decimals = 1)
```



```{r}
#| label: Conception Rate
#| echo: false

breeding_outcomes <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED") |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_event, R) |>
  mutate(
    is_conception = if_else(R %in% c("P", "A"), TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE)
  )

period_services <- breeding_outcomes |>
  cross_join(periods_df) |>
  filter(date_event >= period_start, date_event <= period_end) |>
  left_join(herd_intervals |> select(id_animal_lact, lact_group), by = "id_animal_lact")

cr_summary_grouped <- period_services |>
  filter(lact_group %in% c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+")) |>
  group_by(period_id, period_start, period_end, lact_group) |>
  summarise(
    n_conceptions = sum(is_conception),
    n_services = n(),
    conception_rate = n_conceptions / n_services,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cr_wide <- cr_summary_grouped |>
  select(period_id, period_start, period_end, lact_group, conception_rate) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = lact_group, values_from = conception_rate)

herd_avg_cr <- cr_summary_grouped |>
  group_by(period_id) |>
  summarise(Overall = sum(n_conceptions) / sum(n_services), .groups = "drop")

cr_final <- cr_wide |> left_join(herd_avg_cr, by = "period_id")

cr_final |>
  arrange(desc(period_start)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Conception Rate by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Percent Conception (P & A) per 21-Day Period"
  ) |>
  cols_label(period_id = "Period", period_start = "Start Date", period_end = "End Date", Overall = "Herd Avg") |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+", "Overall"), decimals = 1) |>
  tab_spanner(label = "Lactation Groups", columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+"), id = "lact_spanner") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(align = "center"), locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "lact_spanner")) |>
  grand_summary_rows(
    columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+", "Overall"),
    fns = list(Average = ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE)),
    fmt = list(~fmt_percent(., decimals = 1))
  ) |>
  sub_missing(columns = everything(), missing_text = "0.0%") |>
  tab_options(table.border.left.style = "none", stub.border.style = "none")


```


```{r}
#| label: CR Graph
#| echo: false

cr_summary_grouped |>
  filter(period_start < sort(unique(period_start), decreasing = TRUE)[2]) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = period_start, y = conception_rate, color = lact_group, group = lact_group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Conception Rate Trend by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Calculated per 21-Day Period (Excluding two most recent periods)",
    x = "Period Start Date",
    y = "Conception Rate",
    color = "Lactation Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


cr_summary_grouped |>
  # Still filtering out the last two periods as requested
  filter(period_start < sort(unique(period_start), decreasing = TRUE)[2]) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = conception_rate, fill = lact_group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Conception Rates by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Density plot of CR across all periods (excluding last two)",
    x = "Conception Rate",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Lactation Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```




```{r}
#| label: Pregnancy Rate
#| echo: false

conception_events <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED", R %in% c("P", "A")) |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_event) |>
  mutate(is_preg_event = TRUE)

pr_report <- eligible_cows_by_period |>
  left_join(conception_events, by = "id_animal_lact") |>
  mutate(
    is_preg = if_else(!is.na(is_preg_event) & date_event >= period_start & date_event <= period_end, TRUE, FALSE)
  ) |>
  distinct(period_id, id_animal_lact, .keep_all = TRUE)

pr_summary <- pr_report |>
  group_by(period_id, period_start, period_end, lact_group) |>
  summarise(
    n_eligible = n(),
    n_pregs = sum(is_preg),
    preg_rate = n_pregs / n_eligible,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pr_wide <- pr_summary |>
  filter(lact_group %in% c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+")) |>
  select(period_id, period_start, period_end, lact_group, preg_rate) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = lact_group, values_from = preg_rate)

herd_avg_pr <- pr_summary |>
  group_by(period_id) |>
  summarise(Overall = sum(n_pregs) / sum(n_eligible), .groups = "drop")

pr_final <- pr_wide |> left_join(herd_avg_pr, by = "period_id")

pr_final |>
  arrange(desc(period_start)) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Pregnancy Rate by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Confirmed Conceptions / Eligible Cows per 21-Day Period"
  ) |>
  cols_label(period_id = "Period", period_start = "Start Date", period_end = "End Date", Overall = "Herd Avg") |>
  fmt_percent(columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+", "Overall"), decimals = 1) |>
  tab_spanner(label = "Lactation Groups", columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+"), id = "lact_spanner") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(align = "center"), locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "lact_spanner")) |>
  grand_summary_rows(
    columns = c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+", "Overall"),
    fns = list(Average = ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE)),
    fmt = list(~fmt_percent(., decimals = 1))
  ) |>
  sub_missing(columns = everything(), missing_text = "0.0%") |>
  tab_options(table.border.left.style = "none", stub.border.style = "none")
```

```{r}
#| label: PR Graph
#| echo: false

pr_summary |>
  filter(lact_group %in% c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+")) |>
  # Exclude the two most recent periods
  filter(period_start < sort(unique(period_start), decreasing = TRUE)[2]) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = period_start, y = preg_rate, color = lact_group, group = lact_group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Pregnancy Rate Trend by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Calculated per 21-Day Period (Excluding two most recent periods)",
    x = "Period Start Date",
    y = "Pregnancy Rate",
    color = "Lactation Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

pr_summary |>
  filter(lact_group %in% c("Lact 1", "Lact 2", "Lact 3+")) |>
  # Exclude the two most recent periods
  filter(period_start < sort(unique(period_start), decreasing = TRUE)[2]) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = preg_rate, fill = lact_group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Pregnancy Rates by Lactation Group",
    subtitle = "Density plot of PR across all periods (excluding last two)",
    x = "Pregnancy Rate",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Lactation Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```



```{r}
#| label: Abortions
#| echo: false

all_pregnancies <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED", R %in% c("P", "A")) |>
  mutate(
    month_bred = floor_date(date_event, "month"),
    is_abortion = if_else(R == "A", 1, 0)
  )

# 2. Summarize by cohort
abortion_cohort_table <- all_pregnancies |>
  group_by(month_bred) |>
  summarise(
    total_pregnancies = n(),
    n_abortions = sum(is_abortion),
    abortion_rate = n_abortions / total_pregnancies,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange((month_bred)) |>
  # Exclude current month as it is incomplete
  filter(month_bred < floor_date(Sys.Date(), "month"))

abortion_cohort_table |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Monthly Abortion Cohort Analysis",
    subtitle = "Abortion rate based on the month of original conception"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    month_bred = "Month Bred",
    total_pregnancies = "Total Pregnancies (P+A)",
    n_abortions = "Abortions (A)",
    abortion_rate = "Abortion Rate"
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(columns = abortion_rate, decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_date(columns = month_bred, date_style = "yMMM") |>
  tab_options(table.border.left.style = "none", stub.border.style = "none")

```


```{r}
#| label: Abortion Graph
#| echo: false

abortion_cohort_table |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month_bred, y = abortion_rate)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  labs(
    title = "Abortion Rate by Breeding Cohort",
    subtitle = "Percentage of pregnant cohorts (P+A) that resulted in an abortion",
    x = "Month Bred",
    y = "Abortion Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```



```{r}
#| label: R Mystery
#| echo: false

recheck_events <- events_formatted |>
  filter(R == "R") |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_r = date_event)

all_bred_events <- events_formatted |>
  filter(event == "BRED") |>
  select(id_animal_lact, date_bred = date_event)

prior_bred <- recheck_events |>
  left_join(all_bred_events, by = "id_animal_lact") |>
  filter(date_bred < date_r) |>
  group_by(id_animal_lact, date_r) |>
  slice_max(date_bred, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  rename(date_prev_bred = date_bred) |>
  ungroup()

next_bred <- recheck_events |>
  left_join(all_bred_events, by = "id_animal_lact") |>
  filter(date_bred > date_r) |>
  group_by(id_animal_lact, date_r) |>
  slice_min(date_bred, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  rename(date_next_bred = date_bred) |>
  ungroup()

recheck_timeline <- prior_bred |>
  left_join(next_bred |> select(id_animal_lact, date_r, date_next_bred), 
            by = c("id_animal_lact", "date_r"))

head(recheck_timeline)

```
